hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // ""'); case "$f" in *poker-server/src/main/resources/application.yml) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"ask","permissionDecisionReason":"application.yml holds JWT secret, admin users, and registration passcode — confirm the change with the user before editing."}}';; esac

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // ""'); case "$f" in *poker-server/src/main/java/*|*poker-server/src/test/java/*) (cd /Users/tylervangorder/work/home-poker && ./gradlew :poker-server:test --quiet) 2>&1 | tail -20 ;; *poker-common/src/*) (cd /Users/tylervangorder/work/home-poker && ./gradlew :poker-common:test --quiet) 2>&1 | tail -20 ;; esac
